assertions.description: All five op-amp configurations correctly identified including transimpedance amplifier (U1 unit1), inverting amplifiers with correct gains (-4.7x), and buffer (U2 unit2). RC filter network on REF rail (R7+C10, 159Hz) also correctly identified.

Power comes in from J1 (a 3.6V connector). Since KH-160 only suppresses PWR_FLAG warnings for known power-source footprints, this connector-powered design correctly still reports the warnings — reflecting the missing ERC annotation.
